/CAL: SUPPLEMENTAL 1369PC REPORT FROM DR NOVAK/X: THE PARTIES WILL SUBMITON THE REPORTS,/X: THE REPORTS OF DR MEYERS, DATED 03-12-10, OF DR NOVAK,DATED 03-22-10 AND 03-31-10, COME INTO EVIDENCE,/X: BASED ON THE EVIDENCE,THE COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANT IS NOT COMPETENT TO STAND TRIAL AT THIS TIME,/CTORD:PROBATION IN 	001667 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/

/CAL: 1369PC REPORTS FROM DRS NOVAK AND MEYERS/X: THE DEFENDANT IS ALSO KNOWN AS GREG CAMPBELL,/X: DR MEYERS REPORT DATED 03-12-10 FINDS THE DEFENDANT TO BE COMPETENT FORTRIAL AT THIS TIME,/X: DR NOVAK'S REPORT DATED 03-22-10 FINDS THE DEFENDANT IS NOT COMPETENT FOR TRIAL AT THIS TIME,/CTORD: THE DA'S OFFICE SHALL SUPPLY DR MEYER'S REPORT TO DR NOVAK/X: CRIMINAL PROCEEDINGS REMAIN SUSPENDED,/CONTD: SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT FROM DR NOVAK/DRBN/

/CAL:TO SET DA MTR/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL DECLARES A DOUBT AS TO DEFENDANT'S COMPETENCY,/ /CPSS/CONTD:APPOINTMENT OF EXPERT ON 03-01-10, AT 11:00 A,M,, BEFORE JUDGE MARY MORGAN IN DEPARTMENT 50 (AKA DEPT, 15)/
